title: Spin spin spin with Papa (Eva first)
negativePrompt: extra people, duplicate character, twin, clone, two of the same person, mirrored figure, background extras, crowd, identical sibling, second girl
prompt: Wide shot in @DiningRoom. @Papa holds both of @Eva's hands and lifts her, spinning her in a circle through the air. @Eva: "Spin, spin, spin!" @Eva: "Higher! Higher!" @Papa: "Hold on tight!"
